elements.original_description: A vintage computer monitor with a bulky CRT screen, displaying a simple green text interface, placed on a wooden desk with a classic keyboard and mouse. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a vintage computer setup on a wooden desk. Focus on a bulky CRT monitor with a simple green text interface displayed, no readable characters, text, letters, numbers, or watermarks visible. Include a classic keyboard and mouse. Use cinematic lighting with a soft glow from the monitor, evoking an emotional tone of nostalgia and the persistence of old patterns. High resolution, sharp focus, professional photograph.
